scarcity.description: Limiting the availability of an offer to trigger quick action.
scarcity.rule: Only use if truly limited in time or quantity.

curiosity.description: Using 'Open Loops' to force the reader's brain to seek the answer.
curiosity.rule: The answer MUST be provided in the next 2 sentences.

social_proof.description: Validation from others to build trust and lower the barrier to entry.
social_proof.rule: Include 3 specific credibility markers from brand-voice.md.

contrast.description: Comparing the current pain to the desired future state.
